message:
refactor: remove browser extension, use CDP polyfills only

Extensions are disabled via --disable-extensions flag. File system,
clipboard, and picker functionality now handled entirely by CDP-injected
polyfills (fs_polyfill.js, clipboard_polyfill.js).

Removed dead code from cdp_events.zig that was listening for extension
console.log markers that will never come.

files.patch:
@@ -1,18 +0,0 @@
-{
-  "manifest_version": 3,
-  "name": "Termweb Bridge",
-  "version": "1.0.0",
-  "description": "Bridge extension for termweb browser rendering",
-  "permissions": ["clipboardRead", "clipboardWrite"],
-  "host_permissions": ["<all_urls>"],
-  "content_scripts": [{
-    "matches": ["<all_urls>"],
-    "js": ["content.js"],
-    "run_at": "document_start",
-    "all_frames": true
-  }],
-  "web_accessible_resources": [{
-    "resources": ["termweb-bridge.js"],
-    "matches": ["<all_urls>"]
-  }]
-}
